topic: multi-part percent word problem, comparing quantities
latex:
You and your friend are selling tickets for an orchestra concert. On Thursday, you sold 15 tickets and your friend sold 10 tickets.

\textbf{a.} What percent of the tickets sold on Thursday did you sell?

\textbf{b.} On Friday, you sold 9 tickets and your friend sold 16 tickets. What percent of the tickets sold on Friday did you sell?

\textbf{c.} What percent of the total tickets sold on Thursday and Friday did you sell?
